title: Self-custody must become understandable
body: The product has to help users understand what they control, what they risk, and what they must verify.

title: Security is part of UX
body: In wallet products, unclear UX can become a security failure. Clarity, confirmation, and recovery are part of the protection model.

title: Trezor Suite is the trust surface
body: Hardware creates the root of trust; software shapes daily confidence, comprehension, portfolio visibility, and safe action.

title: Wallet flows must handle edge cases
body: Sending, receiving, fees, networks, confirmation, errors, and recovery all need deliberate flow logic, not screen-level design only.

title: Multi-chain complexity needs structure
body: Assets, accounts, networks, fees, portfolio views, and transaction states must stay legible across desktop and mobile.
